name: Elasticsearch
description: This app integrates with an Elasticsearch installation to implement ingestion and investigative actions

actions.name: Get Config
actions.description: Returns the list of indices and their information currently configured on the ElasticSearch instance

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Run a search query on the Elasticsearch installation. Please escape any quotes that are part of the query string

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of indexes to query on

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Run a query in elasticsearch and ingest the results

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Limit ingestion to these container IDs

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range in epoch time (default: 10 days ago)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range in epoch time (default: now)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of containers to create

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifacts to create per container
